item.title: 曝 DeepSeek V4 四月亮相，但「很难是碾压级的强」
item.guid: 曝-DeepSeek-V4-四月亮相，但「很难是碾压级的强」
item.description:
According to LatePost, DeepSeek's next-generation flagship model V4 is expected to be released in April this year. In January this year, a small-parameter version of V4 was leaked to some open-source framework communities for adaptation. The large-parameter version was originally scheduled to be launched around the Spring Festival but was ultimately postponed. 据晚点 LatePost 报道，DeepSeek 的下一代旗舰模型 V4 预计将于今年 4 月发布。今年 1 月，V4 的小参数版本已流出至部分开源框架社区进行适配，大参数版此前原定于春节前后上线，但最终推迟。

It is worth noting that the report points out that V4 will most likely still be the strongest model in the open-source domain, but "it's hard to be overwhelmingly strong" . 值得注意的是，报道指出， V4 大概率仍将是开源领域最强模型，但「很难是碾压级的强」 。

As AI evaluation standards become increasingly diverse, Benchmark scores can no longer fully measure model capabilities, especially in Agentic application scenarios, where the importance of product reach and long-tail data is increasingly prominent—which is precisely an area where DeepSeek had limited investment previously. 随着 AI 评测标准愈发多元，Benchmark 分数已难以全面衡量模型能力，尤其在 Agentic 应用场景下，产品触手和长尾数据的重要性日益凸显——而这恰恰是 DeepSeek 此前投入有限的领域。

The report also mentioned DeepSeek's 'anti-involution' culture: most employees leave the company between 6 and 7 PM on weekdays, don't clock in in the morning, and have no clear performance reviews or deadlines. 报道还提到 DeepSeek 的「反内卷」文化：多数员工平日在下午 6 ~ 7 点离开公司，早上也不打卡，且没有明确的绩效考核和截止时间。

Founder Liang Wenfeng's reason is straightforward: 'It's hard for a person to work effectively for more than 6 to 8 hours a day. Poor judgment due to overtime fatigue would instead waste valuable computing resources, which is not worth it.' 创始人梁文锋的理由直接：「一个人每天能高质量工作的时间很难超过 6 ~ 8 小时，加班疲劳下的昏庸判断反而会浪费宝贵的算力资源，得不偿失。」

item.title: XREAL 递交港股 IPO 申请
item.guid: XREAL-递交港股-IPO-申请
item.description:
AR glasses company XREAL officially submitted its listing application to the Hong Kong Stock Exchange yesterday, planning to list on the HKEX main board within this year. AR 眼镜公司 XREAL 于昨日正式向港交所递交上市申请，计划于今年内登陆港交所主板。

According to iResearch data, by sales revenue, XREAL has consistently ranked first in the global AR glasses market for four consecutive years from 2022 to 2025; in the broader smart glasses market, XREAL ranked second globally and first in China last year. 根据艾瑞咨询数据，按销售收入计，XREAL 在 2022 年至 2025 年连续四年稳居全球 AR 眼镜市场第一；在更广义的智能眼镜市场中，XREAL 于去年位列全球第二、中国第一。

The prospectus shows that XREAL achieved operating revenue of 516 million RMB last year, with overseas market revenue accounting for as high as 71.0%. Gross profit margin significantly increased from the previous 22.1% to 35.2%, while sales and distribution expense ratio decreased to 25.4%, indicating that overall commercial growth has entered a virtuous cycle. 招股书显示，XREAL 去年实现营业收入 5.16 亿元人民币，海外市场收入占比高达 71.0%，毛利率从此前的 22.1% 大幅提升至 35.2%，销售及分销费用率则降至 25.4%，整体商业化增长进入良性循环。

item.title: J.D. Power 2026 榜单出炉，小米 SU7、YU7 双夺冠
item.guid: J.D.-Power-2026-榜单出炉，小米-SU7、YU7-双夺冠
item.description:
Xiaomi Auto officially announced yesterday that J.D. Power, a leading global market research firm, released two major lists for 2026: the New Energy Vehicle Product Appeal and Performance Index (NEV-APEAL) and the New Energy Vehicle Initial Quality Study (NEV-IQS). Xiaomi Auto achieved 'double vehicles, double lists, double crowns' in the segmented market. 小米汽车官方昨天官宣，全球领先市场研究机构 J.D. Power（君迪）公布 2026 年新能源汽车产品魅力指数（NEV-APEAL）与新能源汽车新车质量研究（NEV-IQS）两大榜单，小米汽车在细分市场实现「双车、双榜、双冠」。

Among them, the first-generation SU7 has won first place in both NEV-APEAL and NEV-IQS for large pure electric sedans for two consecutive years; this year's newly launched Xiaomi YU7 also secured first place in both lists for large pure electric SUVs in its first year on the market. 其中，第一代 SU7 连续两年包揽大型纯电动轿车 NEV-APEAL 与 NEV-IQS 双项第一；今年新上市的小米 YU7 则在上市第一年即获大型纯电动 SUV 两项榜单第一名。

    NEV-APEAL comprehensively measures owners' perceptions of appeal and satisfaction with vehicle design, performance, technology, and other dimensions;

    NEV-IQS, on the other hand, compiles quality issues within 2 to 6 months of new car ownership, objectively verifying overall vehicle quality from two major dimensions: fault-related problems and design/usage defects.

Xiaomi Group CEO Lei Jun subsequently reposted on Weibo to confirm, stating that 'SU7 large pure electric sedan ranked first in the IQS quality list, and YU7 secured first place in the IQS quality list for large pure electric SUVs.' 小米集团 CEO 雷军随后在微博转发确认，表示「SU7 大型纯电轿车 IQS 质量榜第一，YU7 拿到大型纯电 SUV IQS 质量榜第一」。

item.title: 豆包大模型日均 Token 使用量破 120 万亿，三个月翻倍
item.guid: 豆包大模型日均-Token-使用量破-120-万亿，三个月翻倍
item.description:
Yesterday, Volcengine announced at the AI Innovation Roadshow in Wuhan that the video generation model Seedance 2.0 API is officially open for public beta to enterprise users. 昨日，火山引擎在 AI 创新巡展·武汉站上宣布，视频生成模型 Seedance 2.0 API 正式面向企业用户开放公测。

Meanwhile, Volcengine disclosed that as of March this year, daily average Token usage of the Doubao large model has exceeded 120 trillion , doubling over the past three months and increasing by 1000 times compared to its launch in May 2024. 与此同时，火山引擎披露，截至今年 3 月， 豆包大模型日均 Token 使用量已突破 120 万亿 ，较过去三个月增长一倍，较 2024 年 5 月发布时增长 1000 倍。

On the Volcengine platform, the number of enterprise customers with cumulative Token usage exceeding one trillion has grown from 100 at the end of last year to 140. 在火山引擎平台上，累计 Token 使用量超过一万亿的企业客户数量，已从去年底的 100 家增长至 140 家。

In terms of ecosystem development, Peter Steinberger, founder of the OpenClaw open-source project, and Volcengine jointly announced the official launch of ClawHub China Mirror Station, co-built by both parties, aiming to provide a more user-friendly experience for Chinese developers. 在生态建设方面，OpenClaw 开源项目创始人 Peter Steinberger 与火山引擎共同宣布，双方共建的 ClawHub 中国镜像站正式启动运营，旨在为中国开发者提供更友好的使用体验。

🔗 Related reading: Burning 120 trillion Tokens daily, this is the latest 'Versailles' in the AI circle 🔗 相关阅读： 每天烧 120 万亿 Token，这是 AI 圈最新的凡尔赛

item.title: Google 开源 Gemma 4 系列模型
item.guid: Google-开源-Gemma-4-系列模型
item.description:
Early this morning, Google DeepMind released the new generation of open-source model series Gemma 4, launching four models at once, covering all scenarios from edge devices to workstations. 今天凌晨，Google DeepMind 发布了新一代开源模型系列 Gemma 4，一次性推出四款覆盖端侧到工作站全场景的模型。

– E2B : 5.1 billion total parameters, 2.3 billion effective parameters, 128K context, officially stated that memory usage on some devices can be reduced to below 1.5GB; – E2B ：51 亿总参数、23 亿有效参数，128K 上下文，官方称部分设备内存占用可压至 1.5GB 以下；

– E4B : 8 billion total parameters, 4.5 billion effective parameters, 128K context, MMLU Pro reaches 69.4%, close to the previous generation's 27B level; – E4B ：80 亿总参数、45 亿有效参数，128K 上下文，MMLU Pro 达 69.4%，接近上一代 27B 水平；

– 26B A4B MoE : 25.2 billion total parameters, only 3.8 billion active parameters, inference speed close to 4B models, ranked sixth on the Arena AI open-source leaderboard; – 26B A4B MoE ：252 亿总参数、仅 38 亿激活参数，推理速度接近 4B 模型，Arena AI 开源榜排名第六；

– 31B Dense : 31 billion parameters fully activated, 256K context, ranked third on the Arena AI open-source leaderboard. – 31B Dense ：310 亿参数全激活，256K 上下文，Arena AI 开源榜排名第三。

In terms of performance, there's a significant improvement compared to the previous generation Gemma 3 27B. The 31B scored 89.2% in the AIME 2026 math test (up from 20.8% for the previous generation), jumped from 29.1% to 80.0% in the LiveCodeBench v6 code test, and improved from 13.5% to 66.4% in long document processing MRCR v2 128K. 性能方面，与上一代 Gemma 3 27B 相比提升显著。31B 在 AIME 2026 数学测试中得分 89.2%（上一代为 20.8%），LiveCodeBench v6 代码测试从 29.1% 跃升至 80.0%，长文档处理 MRCR v2 128K 从 13.5% 提升至 66.4%。

All models support image and video input, over 140 languages, and have a built-in switchable thinking mode. E2B and E4B are additionally equipped with an audio encoder of approximately 300 million parameters, supporting up to 30 seconds of speech recognition and translation, and can run completely offline on mobile phones, Raspberry Pi, and NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano. 所有模型均支持图像和视频输入及 140 多种语言，并内置可开关的思考模式。E2B 和 E4B 额外搭载约 3 亿参数的音频编码器，支持最长 30 秒的语音识别与翻译，可在手机、树莓派及 NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano 上完全离线运行。

Notably, the Gemma series' open-source license has fully switched to Apache 2.0, allowing developers to freely modify, distribute, and commercialize it without user volume restrictions. Hugging Face co-founder Clément Delangue described this as a "major milestone." 值得注意的是，Gemma 系列开源协议此次全面切换至 Apache 2.0，开发者可自由修改、分发及商用，无用户量门槛限制。Hugging Face 联合创始人 Clément Delangue 对此评价为「重大里程碑」。

item.title: 广电联合会演员委员会发声明：AI 换脸、声纹克隆须授权，「二创」不免责
item.guid: 广电联合会演员委员会发声明：AI-换脸、声纹克隆须授权，「二创」不免责
item.description:
According to a report by "People's Daily," the Actors Committee of the China Association of Radio and Television Social Organizations issued a solemn statement yesterday, collectively addressing infringing acts such as AI face-swapping and voice cloning, demanding a comprehensive regulation of the application boundaries of AI technology in the performing arts field: 据《人民日报》报道，中国广播电视社会组织联合会演员委员会于昨日发布严正声明，针对 AI 换脸、声纹克隆等侵权行为集中表态，要求全面规范 AI 技术在演艺领域的应用边界：

    Rights Protection : Performing artists legally enjoy personality rights such as portrait rights, voice rights, and artistic image rights. Any entity is strictly prohibited from unauthorized collection, use, synthesis, or dissemination of related images, voiceprints, and artistic images without formal written authorization from the individual;

    "Secondary Creation" Not Exempt from Liability : Infringing content such as AI face-matching, voice imitation performances, face-swapping short dramas, and virtual human replication, even if labeled with phrases like "non-commercial," "public sharing," or "personal secondary creation," still bears full responsibility for infringement;

    Platform Responsibility : Online platforms such as short video, live streaming, and film/television distribution must establish and improve AI performing arts content authorization verification mechanisms, immediately investigate and remove existing infringing works, and retain infringement data to assist with evidence collection and traceability;

    Technical Platform Compliance : AI technology research and development and service platforms must strengthen their pre-screening obligations, verifying the authorization qualifications for actor portraits, audio, and other materials uploaded by users;

    Batch Rights Protection : The Actors Committee of the China Association of Radio and Television will launch a network-wide regular infringement monitoring, notarization and evidence preservation, and batch rights protection campaign, pursuing civil, administrative, and even criminal liability against malicious infringing individuals, organizations, and platforms that fail to fulfill their review obligations;

    Compliance Advocacy : Support AI technology in empowering innovation in film, television, and arts under the premise of compliance, advocating for the industry to establish unified and transparent authorization standards and revenue distribution mechanisms for portraits, voiceprints, and artistic images.

item.title: 郭锐出任智界汽车董事长兼 CEO
item.guid: 郭锐出任智界汽车董事长兼-CEO
item.description:
Zhijie Auto announced yesterday that, following board approval, Guo Rui has been appointed Chairman and CEO, taking full responsibility for the company's operations and management. This personnel adjustment is seen as a key signal that Zhijie Auto's brand 2.0 strategy is entering a new phase of full implementation. 智界汽车昨日宣布，经董事会审议通过，任命郭锐为董事长兼 CEO，全面负责公司经营管理工作。此次人事调整被视为智界汽车品牌 2.0 战略进入全面落地新阶段的关键信号。

Dr. Guo Rui graduated from the School of Information Science and Technology at Peking University with a Ph.D. in Science. In his early career, he delved into quantum computing research. His professional career spans three major fields: fast-moving consumer goods, consumer electronics, and automotive, where he led brand and marketing efforts at Fortune 500 companies such as P&G and Huawei. 郭锐博士毕业于北京大学信息科学技术学院，获理学博士学位，早年深耕量子计算研究，其职业生涯横跨快消品、消费电子、汽车三大领域，先后在宝洁、华为等世界 500 强企业主导品牌与市场工作。

In August 2021, he joined the independent Honor as a founding team member, successively serving as Senior Vice President, President of Brand Marketing System, and Group Chief Marketing Officer, and also joining the company's EMT (Executive Management Team) and Investment Committee. 2021 年 8 月，他作为创始团队成员加入独立后的荣耀，先后担任高级副总裁、品牌营销体系总裁、集团首席营销官，并进入公司 EMT（经营管理团队）与投资委员会。

item.title: 腾讯 WorkBuddy 突发登录故障，官方致歉补偿 1000 Credits
item.guid: 腾讯-WorkBuddy-突发登录故障，官方致歉补偿-1000-Credits
item.description:
Yesterday morning at 09:10, some domestic users of WorkBuddy and CodeBuddy experienced login anomalies. The official statement indicated that the team intervened immediately and handled the issue urgently, with related problems gradually being resolved by 11:45 on the same day. 昨天上午 09:10，WorkBuddy 与 CodeBuddy 部分国内用户出现登录异常。官方发布的说明显示，团队在第一时间介入并紧急处理，相关问题已于当日 11:45 逐步修复。

Zhang Jun, PR Director of Tencent, also reposted an apology on Weibo, stating: "We are very sorry for the inconvenience and trouble caused to everyone's work and plans due to the WorkBuddy login anomaly. It has now been fully restored, and we will directly compensate all affected users with 1000 Credits." 腾讯公司公关总监张军也转发致歉微博表示：「很抱歉，因为 WorkBuddy 登录异常，给大家的工作和计划带来不便与困扰。目前已全部恢复，我们将向所有受影响的用户直接补偿 1000 Credits。」

item.title: 海光信息正式公开「内生安全」技术成果，冲刺国产万亿大模型训练
item.guid: 海光信息正式公开「内生安全」技术成果，冲刺国产万亿大模型训练
item.description:
On April 2nd, at the Hygon Information 2026 Spring Technology Communication Conference, Hygon officially unveiled several new achievements based on the concept of "inherent security" and released the annual version of the Hygon DCU software stack, providing computing power support for the training of multiple trillion-parameter large models in China. 4 月 2 日，在海光信息2026年春季技术沟通会上，海光正式公开基于「内生安全」理念的多项新成果，并首发海光 DCU 软件栈年度版本，为国内多个万亿参数大模型训练提供算力支撑。

Ying Zhiwei, Vice President of Hygon Information, stated that the challenges of computing power security in the AI era have surpassed the capabilities of traditional solutions, and breakthroughs must be sought from the very bottom layer of the computing architecture. 海光信息副总裁应志伟表示，AI 时代的算力安全挑战已超越传统方案的能力范畴，必须从计算架构的最底层寻求突破。

On a computing cluster composed of tens of thousands of Hygon CPUs + DCUs, the Hygon team has initially achieved stable operation of 10 trillion model parameters through multiple technologies such as inherent security, operator tuning, compilation optimization, and general-purpose computing integration, with multiple tests like MLPerf reaching internationally leading levels. 在数万张海光 CPU + DCU 组成的算力集群上，海光团队通过内生安全、算子调优、编译优化、通算融合等多重技术，已初步完成 10 万亿模型参数的稳定运行，MLPerf 等多项测试达到国际领先水平。

item.title: 任天堂前销售负责人：Switch 2 涨价「几乎不可避免」
item.guid: 任天堂前销售负责人：Switch-2-涨价「几乎不可避免」
item.description:
According to GamesRadar, former Nintendo sales head Sean recently stated on the Kit & Krysta podcast that a price increase for the Switch 2 is "almost inevitable." 据 GamesRadar 报道，任天堂前销售负责人 Sean 近日在 Kit & Krysta 播客中表示，Switch 2 涨价「几乎不可避免」。

Sean pointed out that multiple factors are currently driving up game hardware costs: widespread tariff policies by the US government, AI-driven chip demand leading to increased memory prices, and recent significant fluctuations in oil prices. Sean 指出，当前多重因素正在推高游戏硬件成本：美国政府大范围关税政策、AI 驱动的芯片需求导致内存价格上涨，以及近期油价大幅波动。

Inflation has persisted for a long time, tariffs won't disappear anytime soon, and AI-driven chip demand is pushing up memory prices.

In contrast, Xbox and PlayStation have repeatedly raised console prices. Starting April 2nd this year, Sony's PS5 series saw a global price increase, with the PS5 Pro's price rising by $150 (approximately 1032 RMB). 作为对比，Xbox 和 PlayStation 已多次上调主机售价。今年 4 月 2 日起，索尼 PS5 系列全球涨价，PS5 Pro 售价涨幅达到 150 美元（约合 1032 元人民币）。

Sean believes that Nintendo is currently taking measures to alleviate pressure, including pricing digital games lower than physical versions. Sean 认为，任天堂目前正采取措施缓解压力，其中包括将数字版游戏定价低于实体版。

Nintendo might be able to postpone price increases for a while, but an eventual price hike is inevitable.

item.title: 华境 S 超前达标行业首个 L2 强标，全系标配华为乾崑智驾 ADS 4 Pro
item.guid: 华境-S-超前达标行业首个-L2-强标，全系标配华为乾崑智驾-ADS-4-Pro
item.description:
Huajing S announced yesterday that its Huawei Qiankun Smart Driving ADS 4 Pro, standard across all models, has preemptively met all performance requirements of the draft mandatory national standard "Safety Requirements for Intelligent Connected Vehicle Combined Driving Assistance Systems." 华境 S 昨日宣布，其全系标配的华为乾崑智驾 ADS 4 Pro 已超前满足《智能网联汽车 组合驾驶辅助系统安全要求》强制性国家标准征求意见稿的全部性能要求。

According to the introduction, the mandatory standard covers a total of 65 field tests, encompassing complex scenarios such as responding to obstacle vehicles in tunnels, high-speed construction lane changes, roundabout navigation, intersections, night driving, and handling vehicles obliquely placed in rain and fog. It also requires vehicles to complete all assessments at the driver-adjustable maximum speed for driving assistance. 据介绍，强标共涵盖 65 项场地试验，覆盖隧道穿行障碍车应对、高速施工改道、环岛绕行、交叉路口、黑夜行车、雨雾斜置车辆应对等复杂场景，并要求车辆在驾驶员可调节的驾驶辅助最高时速下完成全项考核。

As the first flagship model created through the deep strategic cooperation between SAIC-GM-Wuling and Huawei Qiankun, Huajing S actively participated in preliminary tests and successfully passed all six "hell-level" high-difficulty operating conditions. 华境 S 作为上汽通用五菱与华为乾崑深度战略合作打造的首款旗舰车型，主动超前参与摸底测试，并在六大「地狱级」高难度工况中全部顺利通关。

Huajing S will officially make its global debut on April 7th at 19:00 at the "Huayu Wanxiang Jingzhan Xinbian - Huajing S Leading Technology Appreciation Conference," where more technical details will be revealed. 华境 S 将于 4 月 7 日 19:00 在「华育万象 境展新篇——华境 S 领航科技品鉴会」上正式全球首发，更多技术细节届时将揭晓。

item.title: 💡 摩根大通 CEO 戴蒙：AI 将带来三天半工作制，人类寿命有望达 100 岁
item.guid: 💡-摩根大通-CEO-戴蒙：AI-将带来三天半工作制，人类寿命有望达-100-岁
item.description:
According to CBS News, JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon recently stated in an interview that artificial intelligence will fundamentally change the way humans live and work. He predicted that in 30 years, AI is expected to compress the work week to three and a half days and help extend human lifespans to 100 years. 据 CBS News 报道，摩根大通 CEO 杰米·戴蒙（Jamie Dimon）近日在接受采访时表示，人工智能将从根本上改变人类的生活与工作方式。 他预言，30 年后，AI 有望将工作周压缩至三天半，并帮助人类将寿命延长至 100 岁。

I believe that in 30 years, your children might only work three and a half days a week, live to be 100 years old, and many of the diseases that plague our generation will no longer exist. Life will be better.

He further enumerated AI's potential in specific areas: "AI will cure cancer, develop better materials, and significantly reduce traffic accidents." 他进一步列举了 AI 在具体领域的潜力：「AI 将治愈癌症，会开发出更好的材料，还会减少大量交通事故。」

However, Dimon also acknowledged the potential risks brought by AI. He pointed out that AI-driven productivity improvements could impact the job market, especially if the pace of change is too rapid. 不过，戴蒙也坦承了 AI 带来的潜在风险。他指出，AI 驱动的生产力提升可能对就业市场造成冲击，尤其是变革速度过快时。

The world is becoming more efficient, and AI will drive this process. The risk is that this change might come too quickly.

Regarding long-term impact, Dimon believes that AI will ultimately create more jobs than it eliminates. He emphasized that the key is for businesses and governments to prepare in advance, helping workers adapt to changes through large-scale retraining and job transitions. 对于长期影响，戴蒙认为，AI 最终将创造出比消灭更多的就业岗位。他强调，关键在于企业和政府提前做好准备，通过大规模的再培训与岗位转移帮助劳动者适应变化。

We will tell employees that there are other jobs. We will train you and help you transition. And this approach is effective; it just needs to be scaled up.

In the long run, AI will bring enormous benefits to society. If it causes short-term problems, preparations must be made in advance.

item.title: 租电 23 万元起，2026 款蔚来 ES6/EC6 正式上市
item.guid: 租电-23-万元起，2026-款蔚来-ES6/EC6-正式上市
item.description:
Yesterday, the NIO 2026 ES6 and EC6 officially launched. Both models have begun deliveries and are expected to arrive at dealerships sequentially starting in May. First, let's look at the prices: 昨天，蔚来 2026 款 ES6 与 EC6 正式上市，两款车型均已开启交付，预计 5 月起陆续到店。先看价格：

    2026 ES6 full vehicle purchase price starts from 338,000 RMB, battery rental plan starts from 230,000 RMB;

    EC6 full vehicle purchase price starts from 358,000 RMB, battery rental plan starts from 250,000 RMB.

In terms of configuration, both models introduce the new Moon 3.0 exterior package, add a zero-gravity seat for the main driver, come standard with a rear comfort package and a two-point magnetic suction design across all trims, and now include the "small blue light" auxiliary driving indicator as standard. 配置方面，两款车型引入全新 Moon 3.0 外观套件，新增主驾零重力座椅，全系标配后排舒享套装及两点磁吸设计，并新增标配辅助驾驶指示灯「小蓝灯」。

Dual motor combination with 150kW front / 210kW rear. ES6 CLTC range is 630 ~ 650km, EC6 is 635 ~ 655km, and both have a wheelbase of 2915mm. 双电机组合前 150kW / 后 210kW，ES6 CLTC 续航 630 ~ 650km，EC6 为 635 ~ 655km，轴距均为 2915mm。

Both models are equipped with the world's first automotive-grade 5nm intelligent driving chip "Shenji NX9031" and the vehicle-wide operating system "SkyOS·Tianshu", supporting point-to-point full-domain navigation assistance and full-model intelligent parking assistance. 两款车型搭载全球首颗车规级 5nm 智驾芯片「神玑 NX9031」及整车全域操作系统「SkyOS·天枢」，支持点到点全域领航辅助与全模型化智能泊车辅助。

In addition, both models simultaneously launched the "Natural Wonderland Edition", with design inspiration from NIO's global ecological co-construction plan Clean Parks. The ES6 Natural Wonderland Edition starts at 350,000 yuan, and the EC6 Natural Wonderland Edition starts at 370,000 yuan. Battery rental plans start at 242,000 yuan and 262,000 yuan respectively. 此外，两款车型同步推出「自然奇境版」，设计灵感源自蔚来全球生态共建计划 Clean Parks，ES6 自然奇境版整车售价 35 万元起，EC6 自然奇境版整车售价 37 万元起，电池租用方案分别为 24.2 万元与 26.2 万元起。

item.title: 智谱 GLM-5.1 低调上线，与 Claude Opus 4.6 仅差 2.6 分
item.guid: 智谱-GLM-5.1-低调上线，与-Claude-Opus-4.6-仅差-2.6-分
item.description:
Yesterday, Zhipu GLM-5.1 was quietly launched, without a press conference or technical report, directly open to all GLM Coding Plan users (Lite, Pro, Max). 昨天，智谱 GLM-5.1 低调上线，未举行发布会，未发布技术报告，直接面向 GLM Coding Plan 全体用户（Lite、Pro、Max）开放使用。

In the officially released programming capability evaluation, GLM-5.1 scored 45.3 points, only 2.6 points behind Claude Opus 4.6's 47.9 points . Compared to the previous generation GLM-5's 35.4 points, a single iteration improved by nearly 10 points, an increase of about 28%. 在官方公布的编程能力评测中，GLM-5.1 得分 45.3 分， 与 Claude Opus 4.6 的 47.9 分仅差 2.6 分 。与上一代 GLM-5 的 35.4 分相比，单次迭代提升近 10 分，升幅约 28%。

The core capability improvements of GLM-5.1 are concentrated in the following aspects: GLM-5.1 的核心能力提升集中在以下几个方面：

    Programming evaluation score 45.3, SWE-bench Verified score 77.8%, with a gap of less than 3 percentage points from Opus 4.6;

    Supports 200K tokens context window and 131K tokens maximum output length;

    Outstanding performance in Agent scenarios such as BrowseComp web retrieval, MCP-Atlas complex tool calling, and τ²-Bench multi-tool coordinated execution;

    Hallucination rate reduced from 38.6% in the previous generation to 34.1%.

Additionally, Zhipu officially announced the release of the multimodal Coding base model GLM-5V-Turbo yesterday: 此外，智谱昨天还官宣发布了多模态 Coding 基座模型 GLM-5V-Turbo：

    Natively supports multimodal input such as images, videos, and design drafts, with a 200k context window;

    Core capability: Understand design drafts/screenshots and directly generate runnable code (frontend replication);

    Deeply adapted with Claude Code and AutoClaw, supporting a complete GUI Agent closed loop;

    Outstanding performance on GUI benchmarks such as AndroidWorld and WebVoyager, while maintaining pure text programming capabilities.

item.title: Qwen3.6-Plus 发布，支持百万上下文
item.guid: Qwen3.6-Plus-发布，支持百万上下文
item.description:
Alibaba Cloud officially released its new generation large language model Qwen3.6-Plus yesterday, achieving a leapfrog upgrade in programming agents, multimodal reasoning, and long-range planning, with performance close to the Claude series, hailed as the "strongest domestic programming model". 阿里云昨日正式发布新一代大语言模型 Qwen3.6-Plus，在编程智能体、多模态推理及长程规划方面实现跨越式升级，表现接近 Claude 系列，号称「最强编程国产模型」。

    Leap in programming agent capabilities : Significantly enhanced the ability to solve code repository-level problems, supporting autonomous task decomposition, path planning, and completion of testing and modification in scenarios such as frontend development and complex code governance;

    Native multimodal perception : Trained on native multimodal data, it enhances the accuracy of understanding the physical world, parsing complex documents, and video reasoning, and can directly generate frontend code based on design drafts or screenshots;

    Million-level context support : By default, it supports an ultra-long context window of 1 million tokens and is optimized for Vibe Coding, significantly lowering the development threshold through natural language instructions;

    Ecosystem optimization support : It has been opened through Alibaba Cloud Bailian API and deeply optimized for mainstream agent frameworks such as OpenClaw, Claude Code, and Qwen Code.

item.title: 美团发布音频生成模型 LongCat-AudioDiT
item.guid: 美团发布音频生成模型-LongCat-AudioDiT
item.description:
Meituan Longcat yesterday released the audio generation model LongCat-AudioDiT, and simultaneously open-sourced two versions, 1B and 3.5B. 美团龙猫昨日发布音频生成模型 LongCat-AudioDiT，并同步开源 1B 和 3.5B 两个版本。

According to reports, LongCat-AudioDiT performs diffusion modeling directly in the waveform latent space. The entire process only requires one Waveform Variational Autoencoder (Wav-VAE) and one Diffusion Transformer (DiT), fundamentally eliminating error accumulation caused by multi-stage cascading. 据介绍，LongCat-AudioDiT 直接在波形潜空间进行扩散建模，整个流程仅需一个波形变分自编码器（Wav-VAE）和一个扩散 Transformer（DiT），从根源上消除了多阶段级联带来的误差累积。

    Training-Inference Alignment : In each inference step, the latent variables in the prompt region are forcibly reset to ground truth, solving the long-standing timbre drift problem.

    Adaptive Projection Guidance (APG) : Replaces traditional Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG), decomposing the guidance signal into orthogonal and parallel components, retaining beneficial parts and suppressing deteriorating parts, thereby improving timbre similarity while avoiding spectral 'oversaturation'.

In the Seed benchmark test, LongCat-AudioDiT-3.5B achieved a speaker similarity (SIM) of 0.818 on the Chinese test set (Seed-ZH) and 0.797 on the Chinese difficult sentence set (Seed-Hard), surpassing models such as Seed-TTS, CosyVoice3.5, and MiniMax-Speech, achieving the current state-of-the-art (SOTA) results. 在 Seed 基准测试中，LongCat-AudioDiT-3.5B 的说话人相似度（SIM）在中文测试集（Seed-ZH）达到 0.818，中文难句集（Seed-Hard）达到 0.797，超越 Seed-TTS、CosyVoice3.5、MiniMax-Speech 等模型，取得当前最优（SOTA）成绩。

💻 GitHub: https://github.com/meituan-longcat/LongCat-AudioDiT 💻 GitHub: https://github.com/meituan-longcat/LongCat-AudioDiT

🤗 Hugging Face: https://huggingface.co/meituan-longcat/LongCat-AudioDiT 🤗 Hugging Face: https://huggingface.co/meituan-longcat/LongCat-AudioDiT

item.title: 飞书开源 CLI，可直接操控核心工作流
item.guid: 飞书开源-CLI，可直接操控核心工作流
item.description:
Feishu recently officially open-sourced its command-line tool, Feishu CLI (lark-cli), providing AI Agents with a standardized execution entry point for direct operation of Feishu. After integrating Feishu CLI, AI Agents can directly operate Feishu's core business modules, including: 飞书近日正式开源了命令行工具飞书 CLI（lark-cli），为 AI Agent 提供直接操作飞书的标准化执行入口。接入飞书 CLI 后，AI Agent 可直接操作飞书的核心业务模块，包括：

    Messages and Groups: Search, send, reply;

    Cloud Docs / Cloud Space: Create, read/write, comment collaboration, file management;

    Spreadsheets / Multi-dimensional Tables: Read/write cells, manage views and dashboards;

    Calendar: Query schedules, create meetings, recommend free time across time zones;

    Video Conferencing: Obtain meeting minutes and Miaoji transcripts;

    Mailbox: Search, draft, send, archive (this time with enhanced focus);

    Tasks / Knowledge Base / Contacts / Global Search.

Feishu CLI also features specialized optimizations for AI Agent invocation: explaining repair paths to AI when errors occur, automatically guiding for additional authorization when permissions are missing, and streamlining token consumption, significantly increasing the success rate of invocations compared to direct API calls. 飞书 CLI 还针对 AI Agent 调用方式进行了专项优化：出错时向 AI 说明修复路径，缺少权限时自动引导补充授权，并对 Token 消耗进行精简，使调用成功率显著高于直接调用 API。

💻 GitHub: github.com/larksuite/cli 💻 GitHub: github.com/larksuite/cli

item.title: 今麦郎宣布停用「手打」商标，停止相关产品生产
item.guid: 今麦郎宣布停用「手打」商标，停止相关产品生产
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, yesterday, Fan Xianguo, founder and chairman of Jinmailang Group, released a video officially responding to the public controversy surrounding its "Hand-Pulled Noodles" product, which arose due to a discrepancy between its name and actual production process. 据界面新闻报道，昨天，今麦郎集团创始人、董事长范现国发布视频，正式回应旗下「手打挂面」产品因名称与实际工艺不符而引发的舆论争议。

Fan Xianguo stated in the video that the "Hand-Pulled" trademark was registered in 2006 and has been in use for nearly 20 years. To avoid confusion for consumers regarding product descriptions, the company has decided to voluntarily discontinue the use of this trademark and announced that effective today (April 2nd) at midnight, it will immediately cease production of all products bearing the "Hand-Pulled" trademark. 范现国在视频中表示，「手打」商标于 2006 年完成注册，至今已使用近 20 年，为避免产品表述对消费者造成困扰，公司决定主动停用该商标，并宣布自今日（4 月 2 日）凌晨起，立即停止生产所有带有「手打」商标的产品。

The term "Hand-Pulled" typically leads consumers to associate it with manual, handcrafted processes, whereas Jinmailang actually uses a mechanized production process. The significant discrepancy between the two has raised public doubts about false advertising. 「手打」一词通常令消费者联想到人工手工制作的工艺，而今麦郎实际采用的是机械化生产流程，两者之间存在明显落差，引发外界对虚假宣传的质疑。

item.title: 有线耳机市场复苏，销售额暴涨 20%
item.guid: 有线耳机市场复苏，销售额暴涨-20%
item.description:
A recent research report from market research firm Circana shows that wired headphones are experiencing an unexpected market recovery: 市场调研机构 Circana 最新的一份研报显示，有线耳机正在经历一场出人意料的市场复苏：

After five consecutive years of sales decline, with a drop of $42 million in 2024, wired headphones achieved approximately 3% growth last year (equivalent to $15 million). In the first six weeks of this year, wired headphone sales surged by 20% year-on-year, reaching a new ten-year high.

Analyst Ben Arnold pointed out that multiple factors are driving this recovery. With an average price of about $13, wired headphones offer a highly competitive low-cost alternative compared to Bluetooth headphones, which had an average price of about $99 last year. 分析师 Ben Arnold 指出，推动这波复苏的因素是多重的。有线耳机凭借约 13 美元的均价，相比去年均价约 99 美元的蓝牙耳机，提供了极具竞争力的低价替代选项。

At the same time, consumer preference for 'retro' products is also strengthening: last year, 'CCD' camera sales surged by 93%, and vinyl records continued to grow. This, combined with the resurgence of wired headphones, forms a wave of 'nostalgic consumption'. 与此同时，消费者对「复古」产品的偏好也在同步走强：去年「CCD」相机销量激增 93%，黑胶唱片持续增长，这与有线耳机的回潮共同构成了一股「怀旧消费」浪潮。

According to Jimu News, consumers aged 18 to 30 contributed over 60% of wired headphone sales, with the 18 to 24 age group accounting for 38%. Generation Z has become the core driver of this growth. 另据极目新闻报道，18 至 30 岁消费者贡献了有线耳机超六成的销量，其中 18 至 24 岁群体占比达 38%，Z 世代已成为此轮增长的核心驱动力。

item.title: CASETiFY x 村上隆「FULL BLOOM」系列回归
item.guid: CASETiFY-x-村上隆「FULL-BLOOM」系列回归
item.description:
According to NOWRE, the collaboration series between CASETiFY and Japanese contemporary artist Takashi Murakami has officially returned. This return, as an important part of CASETiFY's 15th-anniversary celebration, holds special commemorative significance. 据 NOWRE 报道，CASETiFY 与日本当代艺术家村上隆的联名系列正式回归，此番回归作为 CASETiFY 15 周年庆典的重要组成部分，具有特别的纪念意义。

The newly launched 'Takashi Murakami x CASETiFY: FULL BLOOM' integrated collection features classic character images such as MR. DOB, KAIKAI AND KIKI, and incorporates Murakami's iconic FLOWERS pattern elements. It covers cases for Apple, Samsung, and Google phones, as well as MagSafe-compatible accessories and CASETiFY Travel impact-resistant luggage. 此次推出的「村上隆 x CASETiFY: FULL BLOOM」整合系列涵盖 MR. DOB、KAIKAI AND KIKI 等经典角色形象，并融入村上隆标志性的 FLOWERS 图案元素,覆盖苹果、三星及 Google 手机壳，以及带有 MagSafe 功能的配件产品与 CASETiFY Travel 弹韧防摔旅行箱。

item.title: 《超级马力欧银河大电影》今日上映
item.guid: 《超级马力欧银河大电影》今日上映
item.description:
The Super Mario Galaxy Movie officially hits theaters today. 《超级马力欧银河大电影》今日正式登陆院线。

This film continues from 2023's The Super Mario Bros. Movie, telling the galactic adventure story of Mario and Luigi, who, to confront Bowser Jr. (who intends to rescue his father Bowser), team up with Princess Rosalina and Yoshi the dinosaur to travel through the multiverse and collect Power Stars. 本片续接 2023 年的《超级马力欧兄弟大电影》，讲述马力欧与路易吉为对抗意图解救父亲酷霸的酷霸 Jr.，携手罗莎塔公主与恐龙耀西穿越多元宇宙、收集能量之星的银河冒险故事。

item.title: 《怒呛人生》第二季定档 4 月 16 日
item.guid: 《怒呛人生》第二季定档-4-月-16-日
item.description:
Netflix series 'Beef' Season 2 is officially announced to premiere on April 16. The new season stars Oscar Isaac, Carey Mulligan, Cailee Spaeny, Charles Melton, Youn Yuh-jung, and Song Kang-ho, with writer and creator Lee Sung Jin continuing to helm the project, and A24 remaining the production company. Netflix 剧集《怒呛人生》第二季正式宣布将于 4 月 16 日上线。新季由奥斯卡·伊萨克、凯瑞·穆里根、卡莉·史派妮、查尔斯·梅尔顿、尹汝贞及宋康昊联合出演，编剧及主创李成真继续操刀，制片公司仍为 A24。

The new season's story focuses on a young couple working at a country club who unexpectedly witness a fierce argument between the owner and his wife, subsequently triggering a series of chain reactions within the upper echelons of the club, owned by a Korean-American billionaire (played by Youn Yuh-jung). 新季故事聚焦于一对在乡村俱乐部工作的年轻夫妇，他们意外目睹了老板与其妻子之间的激烈争吵，随即在这家由韩裔亿万富翁（尹汝贞饰）所拥有的俱乐部上流圈层中引发一系列连锁反应。

'Beef' Season 1, starring Ali Wong and Steven Yeun, tells the story of two strangers who become entangled in a road rage incident and seek revenge on each other. After its release, it received widespread acclaim, winning multiple limited series awards including the Emmy Awards, Golden Globe Awards, Critics' Choice Awards, and Screen Actors Guild Awards. 《怒呛人生》第一季由黄阿丽与史蒂文·元主演，讲述两名陌生人因行车纠纷结怨、互相报复的故事，播出后广受好评，斩获艾美奖、金球奖、评论家选择奖及演员工会奖等多个限定剧类别奖项。

item.title: 《坠落 2》定档 8 月北美上映
item.guid: 《坠落-2》定档-8-月北美上映
item.description:
According to blogger 'Hollywood Watch', the popular 2022 thriller-adventure film 'Fall' has announced a sequel, 'Fall 2', set to be released in North America on August 7 this year. 据博主「守望好莱坞」消息，2022 年热门惊悚冒险片《坠落》宣布推出续集，《坠落 2》定档今年 8 月 7 日北美上映。

The sequel stars Harriet Slater, Assema Thomas, and Tom Brittney, with the Spierig Brothers, known for 'Predestination', taking over directing duties. Original director and screenwriter Scott Mann continues to be responsible for the script. 续集由哈里特·斯莱特、阿塞玛·托马斯、汤姆·布里特尼主演，执导筒交由以《前目的地》闻名的斯派瑞兄弟担纲，原作导演兼编剧斯科特·曼继续负责剧本创作。

Regarding the plot, the story focuses on Jax, who is deeply grieving the loss of her sister Hunter. She reunites with Hunter's fearless best friend Luce, and the two embark on a hike to Thailand's famous Kwan Mountains, hoping to heal their emotional wounds. However, a sudden landslide traps them on a precarious skywalk 3,000 feet above the ground, forcing Jax to confront her fears and fight for survival. 剧情方面，故事聚焦于 Jax 因姐妹 Hunter 的离世而深陷悲痛，她与 Hunter 无畏的挚友 Luce 重聚，两人前往泰国著名的 Kwan 山脉徒步，试图借此疗愈内心创伤。然而一场突如其来的山体滑坡，将她们困在了一段摇摇欲坠、距地面 3000 英尺的高空栈道之上，Jax 必须直面恐惧、绝境求生。
